pr.title: Non-Record: Depth Recurrence Research — 20 Ablation Runs, 8 Techniques, 5 Series (best val_bpb=1.2624, 14 eff layers from 6 unique blocks)

output.summary: Stabilize 3-loop depth recurrence with Output-LN, Birkhoff-constrained mixing, FiLM/timestep scaling, and sinusoidal depth encoding under 16MB quantization.
techniques: Output-LN plus FiLM bias for loop-specific conditioning
Birkhoff mixing with capped timestep scaling to curb quantization blowup
Sinusoidal depth encoding for free per-depth signals
